'''鈭歨-l-l''' ('''kahalal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brainstorm|brainstorm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brainstorm|brainstorm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-l-l
|-
! Lemma
| kahalal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihalal|thihalal]] || [[word:jihalal|jihalal]] || [[word:shihalal|shihalal]] || [[word:kihalal|kihalal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhalal|thuthuhalal]] || [[word:jujuhalal|jujuhalal]] || [[word:shushuhalal|shushuhalal]] || [[word:kukuhalal|kukuhalal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhalal|thuhalal]] || [[word:juhalal|juhalal]] || [[word:shuhalal|shuhalal]] || [[word:kuhalal|kuhalal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhalal|thuhalal]] || [[word:juhalal|juhalal]] || [[word:shuhalal|shuhalal]] || [[word:kuhalal|kuhalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehalal|thehalal]] || [[word:jehalal|jehalal]] || [[word:shehalal|shehalal]] || [[word:kehalal|kehalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohalal|thothohalal]] || [[word:jojohalal|jojohalal]] || [[word:shoshohalal|shoshohalal]] || [[word:kokohalal|kokohalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohalal|thohalal]] || [[word:johalal|johalal]] || [[word:shohalal|shohalal]] || [[word:kohalal|kohalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohalal|thohalal]] || [[word:johalal|johalal]] || [[word:shohalal|shohalal]] || [[word:kohalal|kohalal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:halal|halal]] || [[word:halal|halal]] || [[word:halal|halal]] || [[word:halal|halal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:halal|halal]] || [[word:halal|halal]] || [[word:halal|halal]] || [[word:halal|halal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:halal|halal]] || [[word:halal|halal]] || [[word:halal|halal]] || [[word:halal|halal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:halal|halal]] || [[word:halal|halal]] || [[word:halal|halal]] || [[word:halal|halal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙halal|th忙halal]] || [[word:j忙halal|j忙halal]] || [[word:sh忙halal|sh忙halal]] || [[word:k忙halal|k忙halal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahalal|thathahalal]] || [[word:jajahalal|jajahalal]] || [[word:shashahalal|shashahalal]] || [[word:kakahalal|kakahalal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahalal|thahalal]] || [[word:jahalal|jahalal]] || [[word:shahalal|shahalal]] || [[word:kahalal|kahalal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahalal|thahalal]] || [[word:jahalal|jahalal]] || [[word:shahalal|shahalal]] || [[word:kahalal|kahalal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahalal|shahalal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahalal|goshahalal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahalal|gokishahalal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahalaln眉|shahalaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahalalnkn眉|goshahalalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahalaln眉|gokishahalaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahalalsh毛|shahalalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahalalnksh毛|goshahalalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahalalsh毛|gokishahalalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahalalro|shahalalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahalalnkro|goshahalalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahalalro|gokishahalalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahalalmu|shahalalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahalalnkmu|goshahalalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahalalmu|gokishahalalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahalalsher|shahalalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahalalnksher|goshahalalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahalalsher|gokishahalalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahalalng|shahalalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahalalnkng|goshahalalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahalalng|gokishahalalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahalalya|shahalalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahalalnkya|goshahalalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahalalya|gokishahalalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahalalyam|shahalalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahalalnkyam|goshahalalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahalalyam|gokishahalalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahalaln眉sh毛|shahalaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahalalnkn眉sh毛|goshahalalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahalaln眉sh毛|gokishahalaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahalaln眉ro|shahalaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahalalnkn眉ro|goshahalalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahalaln眉ro|gokishahalaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahalaln眉mu|shahalaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahalalnkn眉mu|goshahalalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahalaln眉mu|gokishahalaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahalalsh毛n眉|shahalalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahalalnksh毛n眉|goshahalalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahalalsh毛n眉|gokishahalalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahalalsh毛ro|shahalalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahalalnksh毛ro|goshahalalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahalalsh毛ro|gokishahalalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahalalsh毛mu|shahalalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahalalnksh毛mu|goshahalalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahalalsh毛mu|gokishahalalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahalalron眉|shahalalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahalalnkron眉|goshahalalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahalalron眉|gokishahalalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahalalrosh毛|shahalalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahalalnkrosh毛|goshahalalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahalalrosh毛|gokishahalalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahalalromu|shahalalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahalalnkromu|goshahalalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahalalromu|gokishahalalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahalalmun眉|shahalalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahalalnkmun眉|goshahalalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahalalmun眉|gokishahalalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahalalmush毛|shahalalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahalalnkmush毛|goshahalalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahalalmush毛|gokishahalalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahalalmuro|shahalalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahalalnkmuro|goshahalalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahalalmuro|gokishahalalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
